html:
2026-0308
2026-04-09PSRoyal Canadian Mounted Police ActAppointment of the full-time member and Vice-Chairperson of the Civilian Review and Complaints Commission for the Royal Canadian Mounted PoliceAppointment of Roxanne M. Gagné of Candiac, Quebec, to be a full-time member and Vice-Chairperson of the Civilian Review and Complaints Commission for the Royal Canadian Mounted Police, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of five years, effective April 20, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment of the full-time member and Vice-Chairperson of the Civilian Review and Complaints Commission for the Royal Canadian Mounted Police
precis: Appointment of Roxanne M. Gagné of Candiac, Quebec, to be a full-time member and Vice-Chairperson of the Civilian Review and Complaints Commission for the Royal Canadian Mounted Police, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of five years, effective April 20, 2026.
